message:
fix: update module path and bump version to v0.10.1

Completed module renaming to github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer. Bumped version to v0.10.1 to include critical fixes.

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 package version
 
 // Version is the current application version
-const Version = "v0.10.0"
\ No newline at end of file
+const Version = "v0.10.1"
